signals.npcLine: Capital seethes, value dips as shadows creep across markets.
signals.questPulse: Seek sources of instability before circuits fry.
signals.worldFeed: Global credits flicker weak; whispers of systemic strain intensify.
signals.clueEvent: Nodes falter; data streams reveal hidden selloffs.

signals.npcLine: Crypto arrays fragment, sentiment sinks into fear grid.
signals.questPulse: Intercept rogue traders exploiting chaos in digital funds.
signals.worldFeed: Algorithms falter amid rising unease; trust wanes.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual transaction spikes detected on peripheral ledgers.

signals.npcLine: Fragmented tokens gain faint traction, but danger looms.
signals.questPulse: Trace whispers on SPK and CHIP circuits; signals weak but persistent.
signals.worldFeed: Trending tokens flicker unevenly; unknown forces at play.
signals.clueEvent: Hidden code echoes hint at unstable asset undercurrents.

signals.npcLine: Dive into dark nets, unravel cryptic market tremors.
signals.questPulse: Hunt digital phantoms riding market fearwaves.
signals.worldFeed: Fear index spikes; rogue data syndicates exploit confusion.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted chatter reveals planned pump and dump schemes.

signals.npcLine: Cyber-smugglers murmur of new tokens flickering in the black.
signals.questPulse: Engage with informants to map token surges amid dread.
signals.worldFeed: Market shadows move swiftly; new digital assets arise from chaos.
signals.clueEvent: Leaks show sudden network activity on PENGU and RAVE chains.
